add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, embed a file using FileSpecification, and create a file attachment annotation on a page.

embed-file-attachment-from-byte-array.title: Embed a File Attachment in PDF from a Byte Array
embed-file-attachment-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to create a FileSpecification from a byte array using a MemoryStream and add it to a PDF as a file attachment annotation.

add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Attachments to a PDF
add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach several files to an existing PDF by iterating a list of file paths and saving the updated document.

set-custom-description-mime-type-attachm.title: Set Custom Description and MIME Type for PDF Attachments
set-custom-description-mime-type-attachm.description: Shows how to modify the description and MIME type of embedded file attachments in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachments-to-pdf-save-output.title: Add Attachments to PDF and Save to Output Folder
add-attachments-to-pdf-save-output.description: Demonstrates how to embed files as attachments in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified PDF to a specified output directory.

list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments with Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its embedded files collection, and iterate through each attachment to output its name and size in bytes.

extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Attachment from PDF
extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate an embedded file in a PDF by name and save it to a specified directory using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.title: Extract PDF Attachments to Separate Subfolders
extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its embedded file attachments, creates a dedicated subfolder for each, and saves the attachments to disk, using reflection to access the attachment name and save method.

remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.title: Remove PDF Attachment by Index
remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.description: Shows how to delete an embedded file from a PDF using its zero‑based index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.title: Delete PDF Attachment by Filename
delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.description: Demonstrates how to locate and remove an embedded file from a PDF using its filename with Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.title: Extract PDF Attachment Metadata to JSON
extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.description: Shows how to read file attachment annotations from a PDF, retrieve each attachment's file name and creation date, and serialize the collected metadata to a JSON file.

update-attachment-description-pdf.title: Update File Attachment Description in PDF
update-attachment-description-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate file attachment annotations in a PDF, modify their description, and re‑save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-to-protected-pdf.title: Add Attachment to Password-Protected PDF
add-attachment-to-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a user password, embed a file attachment, and save the document while preserving its encryption.

extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from Encrypted PDF
extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its embedded file attachments, and save each attachment to a local folder.

validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.title: Validate Attachment Size Before Adding to PDF
validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.description: The example checks a file's size against a defined limit before embedding it as a file attachment annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF files and embed the same attachment into each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.title: Batch Extract PDF Attachments to ZIP Archive
batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, collect file‑attachment annotations, and store each embedded file in a consolidated ZIP archive.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Attachments
create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.description: Shows how to create an empty PDF document, initialize its collection, add files as attachments using FileSpecification, and save the result as a PDF portfolio.

add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Word Document to PDF Portfolio
add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a Word (.docx) file into a PDF portfolio by creating a FileSpecification and adding it to the Document.Collection using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Insert Excel Workbook into PDF Portfolio with Description
insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed an existing Excel workbook into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom description using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Embed Image into PDF Portfolio with Display Name
embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to create a PDF portfolio, embed an image file, and assign a custom display name to the embedded file using Aspose.Pdf.

add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.title: Add Nested PDF to Existing PDF Portfolio
add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed a PDF file as a nested item inside an existing PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf by creating a FileSpecification and adding it to the portfolio's EmbeddedFiles collection.

add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Multiple Files to a PDF Portfolio
add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates embedding various file types into a single PDF portfolio using a loop with Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-portfolio-using-optimizatio.title: Compress PDF Portfolio Using Optimization Options
compress-pdf-portfolio-using-optimizatio.description: Loads an existing PDF portfolio, enables object compression via OptimizationOptions, and saves the compressed PDF.

extract-files-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-files-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate embedded files in a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf, preserve their original folder structure, and write each file to a target directory. The example also shows a fallback method to extract file streams when the Save method is unavailable.

extract-embedded-file-by-index.title: Extract Embedded File from PDF by Index
extract-embedded-file-by-index.description: Loads a PDF document, retrieves an embedded file at a given 1‑based index, and saves it to disk preserving its original name and extension.

remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio-.title: Remove Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio-.description: Shows how to delete an embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its zero‑based collection index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-outline-item-by-description.title: Delete PDF Outline Item by Description
delete-pdf-outline-item-by-description.description: Shows how to remove a PDF outline (bookmark) whose title matches a given string using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-bookmarks.title: Reorder PDF Bookmarks (Outline)
reorder-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to change the order of PDF outline items (bookmarks) by extracting them, clearing the outline collection, and re‑adding them in a custom sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-template-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Apply Custom Visual Template to PDF Portfolio
apply-custom-template-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Loads an existing PDF portfolio, adds a semi‑transparent background rectangle and a header text to each page using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing classes, and saves the modified document.

generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.title: Generate Thumbnails for PDF Portfolio Items
generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.description: The example loads a PDF, renders each page to a PNG thumbnail using the Drawing API, and assembles those thumbnails into a new PDF document.

merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.title: Merge PDF Portfolios Preserving Metadata
merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.description: Shows how to combine two PDF portfolio files into a single PDF while retaining all embedded files and their metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-embed-files.title: Create PDF Portfolio by Embedding Files
create-pdf-portfolio-embed-files.description: Shows how to convert a regular PDF into a PDF Portfolio by adding multiple embedded files using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-portfolio.title: Flatten PDF Portfolio to Standard PDF
flatten-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to load a PDF Portfolio, flatten it to remove interactive collection features, and save it as a regular PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.title: Read PDF Metadata and Count Attachments
read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract standard metadata fields and determine the number of embedded file attachments, then write a simple text report.

generate-csv-report-pdf-attachments.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Attachments
generate-csv-report-pdf-attachments.description: Loads a PDF document, enumerates its embedded file attachments, extracts each attachment's name, size, and description, and writes the information to a CSV file.

add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add In-Memory Attachment to PDF
add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding a file into an existing PDF using a MemoryStream, avoiding intermediate disk files, and saving the updated document.

attach-remote-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Remote File to PDF as a File Annotation
attach-remote-file-to-pdf.description: Downloads a file from a remote URL into memory and embeds it in a PDF as a file‑attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, checking for missing files, creating a file attachment annotation, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-mime-type-add-attachment.title: Validate MIME Type and Add File Attachment to PDF
validate-mime-type-add-attachment.description: The example verifies that an attachment's MIME type matches its file extension, then embeds the file into a PDF as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

measure-pdf-attachment-performance.title: Measure Performance of Adding, Extracting, and Removing PDF Attachments
measure-pdf-attachment-performance.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment annotation, extract attached files, and remove attachments from a PDF while logging the time taken for each operation using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-attachment-with-metadata-into-pdf.title: Embed Attachment with Metadata into PDF
embed-attachment-with-metadata-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf and add custom attachment metadata to the document information dictionary before saving.

add-unicode-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Unicode File Attachment to PDF
add-unicode-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding a file with a Unicode filename as a file attachment annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and verifies the annotation count.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its embedded files, reads each attachment stream, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for integrity verification.

batch-add-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Watermark to PDF Pages
batch-add-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages, creates a centered red text watermark using WatermarkArtifact, adds it to each page (optionally only pages with file‑attachment annotations), and saves the result.

add-file-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry
add-file-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to the first page of a PDF stored on a network share and retry the operation on transient I/O or access errors using exponential back‑off.

extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.title: Extract PDF Attachments in Parallel
extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF files concurrently, enumerate their embedded files, and save each attachment to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-size-after-attachment.title: Verify PDF Size Increases After Adding File Attachment
verify-pdf-size-after-attachment.description: The example creates a simple PDF, adds a file attachment annotation, saves the modified document, and asserts that the resulting file size is larger than the original.

test-attachment-removal-updates-collecti.title: Test Attachment Removal Updates Collection Count
test-attachment-removal-updates-collecti.description: Shows an integration test using xUnit that verifies removing an attachment from a ThreadMessageResponse correctly updates the Attachments collection count.

embed-hidden-xml-metadata-pdf-attachment.title: Embed Hidden XML Metadata as PDF Attachment
embed-hidden-xml-metadata-pdf-attachment.description: Shows how to serialize XML metadata to a memory stream and embed it as a hidden file attachment annotation inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
